scene: Shenzhen Metro — Ticket Purchase and Boarding

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ɡʊd mɔrnɪŋ | ˈwɛlkəm tə ʃɛnˈdʒɛn ˈmɛtroʊ | wɪʧ stɑːʃən wʊd ju laɪk tə ɡoʊ
conversation.english: Good morning! Welcome to Shenzhen Metro. Which station would you like to go?
conversation.chinese: 早上好！欢迎来到深圳地铁。您想去哪个站？

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: hɑɪ | aɪ wʊd laɪk tə ɡoʊ tu luːhuː stɑːʃən pliz
conversation.english: Hi! I would like to go to Luohu Station, please.
conversation.chinese: 你好！我想去罗湖站，谢谢。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: sɜːr | wʊd ju laɪk ə sɪŋɡl ɔr rɪtərn tɪkɪt
conversation.english: Sure! Would you like a single or return ticket?
conversation.chinese: 好的！您需要单程票还是往返票？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ðæt wɪl bi ˈtɛn juənz | pliz peɪ hɪər
conversation.english: That will be 10 yuan. Please pay here.

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: θæŋk ju | hɪər ɪz jər tɪkɪt | pleɪz keɪp ɪt seɪf
conversation.english: Thank you. Here is your ticket. Please keep it safe.
conversation.chinese: 谢谢，这是您的车票，请妥善保管。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: θæŋks | wɪtʃ plætfɔːrm ɪz fɔr luːhuː stɑːʃən
conversation.english: Thanks. Which platform is for Luohu Station?
conversation.chinese: 谢谢，请问去罗湖站是哪个站台？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ˈplætfɔːrm ˌnʌmbər wʌn | fɔːr ðə ðə trɛn ˈdɛstɪnd tu luːhuː
conversation.english: Platform number one, for the train heading to Luohu.
conversation.chinese: 1号站台，去往罗湖方向的列车。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: ɡrɛɪt | θæŋks | aɪ wɪl weɪt hɪr
conversation.english: Great, thanks. I will wait here.
conversation.chinese: 好的，谢谢。我会在这里等。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: pleɪz ˈwɛr bɪˌhaɪnd ðə seɪfti laɪn | ə trɛn wɪl əˈpraʊʧ ˈʃɔrtli
conversation.english: Please stand behind the safety line. A train will approach shortly.
conversation.chinese: 请站在安全线后，列车即将进站。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: ˈθæŋks fɔr ðə ɪnfoʊ | aɪ wɪl be keɪrfl
conversation.english: Thanks for the info. I will be careful.
conversation.chinese: 谢谢提醒，我会注意安全的。
